name: simple-gstack-codex
description: Codex engineering operating system skills for file-first planning, implementation, review, QA, release, and context management.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex as a file-first engineering OS.
interface.longDescription: A repo-linked Codex plugin that turns the gstack workflow into bounded Codex work modes with shared source-of-truth, artifact, stop, and verification rules.
defaultPrompt: Use $gstack-plan to create the engineering plan.
Use $gstack-implement to execute the active task.
Use $gstack-review to inspect the current diff.
